query: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN phone varchar(20) AFTER openId; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN password varchar(255) AFTER phone; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN isActive boolean DEFAULT true AFTER role; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN latitude decimal(10, 8) AFTER isActive; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN longitude decimal(11, 8) AFTER latitude; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN totalCommission decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER longitude; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN totalDebt decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER totalCommission; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN isBlocked boolean DEFAULT false AFTER totalDebt; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN pendingCommission decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER isBlocked; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN paidCommission decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER pendingCommission; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN accountStatus enum('active', 'suspended', 'disabled') DEFAULT 'active' AFTER paidCommission; ALTER TABLE users MODIFY COLUMN role enum('customer', 'driver', 'admin') DEFAULT 'customer';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2oQmmycGP8rsfza.root --database jUxNutum7DPpufYQFewXBS --execute ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN phone varchar(20) AFTER openId; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN password varchar(255) AFTER phone; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN isActive boolean DEFAULT true AFTER role; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN latitude decimal(10, 8) AFTER isActive; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN longitude decimal(11, 8) AFTER latitude; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN totalCommission decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER longitude; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN totalDebt decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER totalCommission; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN isBlocked boolean DEFAULT false AFTER totalDebt; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN pendingCommission decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER isBlocked; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN paidCommission decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER pendingCommission; ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN accountStatus enum('active', 'suspended', 'disabled') DEFAULT 'active' AFTER paidCommission; ALTER TABLE users MODIFY COLUMN role enum('customer', 'driver', 'admin') DEFAULT 'customer';
